case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BOUZEK, FRANKIE J. JR.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-04-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-20-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-19-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-21-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOUZEK, FRANKIE J. JR. TOO MANY PREVIOUS CONTINUANCES AND CCSF ADMITTED THEY HAD NO FILE AND WERE NOT PREPARED TO PROCEED TO TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
